```{r}
library(readr)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(igraph)
library(ggraph)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggforce)
library(stringr)
library(ggrepel)
```

```{r}
features <- read_tsv("data/ml_disease_seeds_importance.tsv")

features_scaled <- features |>
  group_by(class, term) |>
  filter(n() > 5) |>
  slice(1) |>
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
# Sample metadata ----
sample_meta <- read_excel("data/samples_2025-10-10.xlsx") |>
  mutate(
    Disease = ifelse(Cohort == "PARD", Diagnose, Disease),
    Disease = ifelse(Disease %in% c("Healthy control", "healthy", "Control"), "Healthy", Disease),
    Disease = case_when(Disease == "Pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma" ~ "Pancreatic cancer",
                        Diagnose == "OVC" ~  "Ovarian cancer",
                        Diagnose == "BRC" ~ "Breast cancer",
                        Diagnose == "LUNG" ~ "Lung cancer",
                        Diagnose == "CRC" ~ "Colorectal cancer",
                        Diagnose == "PRC" ~ "Prostate cancer",
                        Diagnose == "4_random" ~ "BAMSE - visit 4",
                        Diagnose == "8_random" ~ "BAMSE - visit 8",
                        Diagnose == "16_random" ~ "BAMSE - visit 16",
                        Diagnose == "24_random" ~ "BAMSE - visit 24",
                        Diagnose == "pregnancy" ~ "Pregnancy",
                        Diagnose == "PD" ~ "Parkinson's disease",
                        T ~ Disease),
    Class = case_when(Disease %in% c("Breast cancer", "Colorectal cancer", "Lung cancer", "Ovarian cancer", "Prostate cancer") ~ "Cancer",
                      Disease == "Parkinson's disease" ~ "Neurologic",
                      Cohort == "BAMS" ~ "Healthy",
                      Cohort == "PREG" ~ "Healthy",
                      Disease == "Healthy" ~ "Healthy",
                      T ~ Class)
    ) |>
  select(DAid, Cohort, Class, Disease, Age, Sex, BMI)

soma_meta <- read_tsv("data/meta_phase2_somalogic_elod_20251028.tsv")

disease_class <- c(
  "Global" = "#E5E5E5",  # Add a color for Global
  "Healthy" = "#C9B28F",
  "Cardiovascular" = "#ED936B",
  "Metabolic" = "#E0C59A",
  "Cancer" = "#919FC7",
  "Neurologic" = "#7DC0A6",
  "Psychiatric" = "#7DC0A6",
  "Infection" = "#F9DA56",
  "Autoimmune" = "#DA8EC0"
)
```

```{r}
features_scaled <- features_scaled |>
  mutate(
    platform = if_else(startsWith(term, "seq."), "SomaScan", "Olink")
  ) |>
  left_join(
    soma_meta |> select(AptName, EntrezGeneSymbol),
    by = c("term" = "AptName")
  ) |>
  rename(Assay = EntrezGeneSymbol) |>
  mutate(
    Assay = if_else(platform == "Olink", term, Assay)
  )

# Count number of duplicated Assays per disease (both platforms)
assay_platform_dupes <- features_scaled |>
  distinct(Disease = class, Assay, platform) |>
  group_by(Disease, Assay) |>
  filter(n() > 1) |>
  ungroup()

dupe_counts <- assay_platform_dupes |>
  count(Disease, name = "n_dupe_assays") |>
  filter(n_dupe_assays > 0)

ggplot(dupe_counts, aes(x = reorder(Disease, n_dupe_assays), y = n_dupe_assays)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    x = "Disease",
    y = "Number of duplicated Assay names (Olink & SomaScan)",
    title = "Diseases with Assays present in both platforms"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# For each Assay, check if it appears in at least one Olink and at least one SomaScan disease
assay_disease_platform <- features_scaled |>
  distinct(Assay, Disease = class, platform)

# Exclude (Assay, Disease) pairs that appear in both platforms for the same disease
assay_disease_platform_nodup <- assay_disease_platform |>
  group_by(Assay, Disease) |>
  filter(n_distinct(platform) == 1) |>
  ungroup()

assay_platform_summary <- assay_disease_platform_nodup |>
  group_by(Assay) |>
  summarise(
    n_olink = sum(platform == "Olink"),
    n_soma = sum(platform == "SomaScan"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  filter(n_olink > 0, n_soma > 0)

n_cross_platform_assays <- nrow(assay_platform_summary)
n_cross_platform_assays
```

```{r}
donut_width <- 0.1
platform_colors <- c("Olink" = "#6FC2EE", "SomaScan" = "#D82F88", "Both" = "#312F7C")

# Step 1: Collapse platform per Assay+class
features_collapsed <- features_scaled |>
  group_by(class, Assay) |>
  summarise(
    platform = if (n_distinct(platform) > 1) "Both" else first(platform),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Step 2: For each Assay, check if it appears as both Olink and SomaScan across ANY classes
#         If so, mark ALL its entries as "Both"
assay_cross_platform <- features_collapsed |>
  group_by(Assay) |>
  summarise(
    has_olink = any(platform %in% c("Olink", "Both")),
    has_soma  = any(platform %in% c("SomaScan", "Both")),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(is_cross = has_olink & has_soma)

features_collapsed <- features_collapsed |>
  left_join(assay_cross_platform |> select(Assay, is_cross), by = "Assay") |>
  mutate(platform = if_else(is_cross, "Both", platform)) |>
  select(-is_cross)

# 1. Annotate Assays as unique/shared across classes
assay_class_counts <- features_collapsed |> count(Assay, name = "n_class")
features_annot <- features_collapsed |>
  left_join(assay_class_counts, by = "Assay")

# 2. Unique Assays per class (appear in only one class)
unique_assays <- features_annot |> filter(n_class == 1)
unique_counts <- unique_assays |> count(class, name = "n_unique")

# 3. Shared Assays: group by set of classes they appear in
shared_assays <- features_annot |> filter(n_class > 1)
shared_groups <- shared_assays |>
  group_by(Assay) |>
  summarise(classes = list(sort(unique(class))), .groups = "drop") |>
  group_by(classes) |>
  summarise(n_shared = n(), .groups = "drop")

# 4. Build nodes
class_nodes <- tibble(
  name = unique(features_collapsed$class),
  type = "class",
  label = stringr::str_replace_all(name, " ", "\n"),
  size = 30
)

unique_nodes <- unique_counts |> mutate(
  name = paste0(class, "_unique"),
  type = "unique",
  label = as.character(n_unique),
  size = scales::rescale(n_unique, to = c(5, 14))
)

shared_nodes <- shared_groups |> mutate(
  name = paste0("shared_", row_number()),
  type = "shared",
  label = as.character(n_shared),
  size = scales::rescale(n_shared, to = c(5, 14))
)

nodes <- bind_rows(
  class_nodes |> select(name, type, label, size),
  unique_nodes |> select(name, type, label, size),
  shared_nodes |> select(name, type, label, size)
)

# 5. Build edges
edges_unique <- unique_counts |> mutate(
  from = class,
  to = paste0(class, "_unique")
) |> select(from, to)

edges_shared <- shared_nodes |>
  mutate(classes = shared_groups$classes) |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(edge_list = list(tibble(from = classes, to = name))) |>
  unnest(edge_list) |>
  select(from, to)

edges <- bind_rows(edges_unique, edges_shared)

# 6. Platform proportions for unique nodes
unique_platform <- unique_assays |>
  count(class, platform) |>
  group_by(class) |>
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) |>
  ungroup()

# 7. Platform proportions for shared nodes
shared_platform <- shared_assays |>
  group_by(Assay) |>
  mutate(classes = list(sort(unique(class)))) |>
  ungroup() |>
  left_join(
    shared_nodes |> mutate(classes = shared_groups$classes) |> select(name, classes),
    by = "classes"
  ) |>
  count(name, platform) |>
  group_by(name) |>
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) |>
  ungroup()

# 8. Get class -> color mapping
class_color_map <- features_scaled |>
  distinct(class) |>
  left_join(
    sample_meta |> select(Disease, Class) |> distinct() |>
      mutate(color = disease_class[Class]),
    by = c("class" = "Disease")
  ) |>
  select(class, color) |>
  filter(!is.na(color))

# 9. Layout
g <- graph_from_data_frame(edges, vertices = nodes, directed = FALSE)
layout_coords <- ggraph::create_layout(g, layout = "fr")

nodes_pos <- nodes |>
  mutate(
    x = layout_coords$x,
    y = layout_coords$y
  )

# 10. Unified size scale
count_range <- range(as.numeric(nodes_pos$label[nodes_pos$type != "class"]), na.rm = TRUE)
r_range <- c(0.15, 0.45)
size_range <- c(3, 12)

nodes_pos <- nodes_pos |>
  mutate(
    point_size = if_else(
      type != "class",
      scales::rescale(as.numeric(label), to = size_range, from = count_range),
      NA_real_
    )
  )

# 11. Pie data for unique nodes
pie_unique <- nodes_pos |>
  filter(type == "unique") |>
  mutate(class = str_remove(name, "_unique")) |>
  left_join(unique_platform, by = "class", relationship = "many-to-many") |>
  mutate(r = scales::rescale(as.numeric(label), to = r_range, from = count_range))

# 12. Pie data for shared nodes
pie_shared <- nodes_pos |>
  filter(type == "shared") |>
  left_join(shared_platform, by = "name", relationship = "many-to-many") |>
  mutate(r = scales::rescale(as.numeric(label), to = r_range, from = count_range))

pie_data_all <- bind_rows(
  pie_unique |> select(x, y, platform, prop, r, label, name),
  pie_shared |> select(x, y, platform, prop, r, label, name)
)

# 13. Split into single-platform (point) and multi-platform (donut)
n_platforms <- pie_data_all |>
  group_by(name) |>
  summarise(n_platform = n_distinct(platform), .groups = "drop")

pie_data_all <- pie_data_all |>
  left_join(n_platforms, by = "name")

pie_nodes <- pie_data_all |>
  filter(n_platform > 1) |>
  group_by(x, y) |>
  mutate(
    end_angle = cumsum(prop) * 2 * pi,
    start_angle = lag(end_angle, default = 0)
  ) |>
  ungroup()

point_nodes <- pie_data_all |>
  filter(n_platform == 1) |>
  distinct(x, y, platform, label, r)

# 14. Class ring
class_ring <- nodes_pos |>
  rename(class = name) |>
  filter(type == "class") |>
  left_join(class_color_map, by = "class") |>
  mutate(color = replace_na(color, "#888888"))

# 15. Plot
p <- ggraph(layout_coords) +
  geom_edge_link(color = "grey60") +
  # Class nodes: colored ring
  geom_point(
    data = class_ring,
    aes(x = x, y = y, color = color),
    size = 32, shape = 21, fill = "black", stroke = 5,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_color_identity() +
  # Single-platform nodes: solid colored ring (no pieces)
  geom_circle(
    data = point_nodes,
    aes(x0 = x, y0 = y, r = r, fill = platform),
    color = "white", linewidth = 0.3,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  # White inner circle for single-platform nodes
  geom_circle(
    data = point_nodes,
    aes(x0 = x, y0 = y, r = r - donut_width),
    fill = "white", color = "white", linewidth = 0,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  # Multi-platform nodes: donut charts
  geom_arc_bar(
    data = pie_nodes,
    aes(x0 = x, y0 = y, r0 = r - donut_width, r = r,
        start = start_angle, end = end_angle, fill = platform),
    color = "white", linewidth = 0.3,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  # White inner circle for donut nodes
  geom_circle(
    data = pie_nodes |> distinct(x, y, r),
    aes(x0 = x, y0 = y, r = r - donut_width),
    fill = "white", color = "white", linewidth = 0,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = platform_colors, name = "Platform") +
  scale_size_identity() +
  # Count labels in center of donut nodes
  geom_text(
    data = nodes_pos |> filter(type != "class") |>
      semi_join(pie_nodes |> distinct(x, y), by = c("x", "y")),
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    size = 2.5, fontface = "bold", color = "black",
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  # Count labels in center of single-platform nodes
  geom_text(
    data = point_nodes,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    size = 2.5, fontface = "bold", color = "black",
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  # Labels inside class nodes
  geom_text(
    data = nodes_pos |> filter(type == "class"),
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    size = 3, fontface = "bold", color = "white",
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_void()

ggsave("results/feature_network_both_strict.pdf", p, width = 16, height = 16, dpi = 300)
p
```
